prestazioni: Engine swap to a 6.1L Chrysler SRT-8 Hemi (engine code: ESF) with forged internals including Manley I-beam connecting rods, JE 10.5:1 forged pistons, and a Comp Cams 276H hydraulic roller camshaft (230°/236° duration, 0.580" lift) for high-RPM power retention while maintaining street drivability

Forced induction via a Precision Turbo & Engine PT8285CE turbocharger (85mm, 850hp capable) on a custom cast manifold with Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate and Tial 50mm blow-off valve, paired with a custom 4" aluminum intercooler piping system and a PWR 4-core bar-and-plate intercooler (1200hp heat rejection)

Fuel system upgrade featuring a Fore Innovations F2 fuel system with dual 450 LPH in-tank pumps, ID1700x injectors, and a Radium Engineering dual catch can setup to prevent oil dilution, alongside a Holley Dominator ECU with custom tuning by Lund Racing for E85 compatibility and boost-by-gear mapping
estetica: Widebody conversion using a Dodge Charger SE-specific Rocket Bunny V3 kit (fiberglass fenders, carbon fiber front bumper, and rear diffuser) with custom 1.5" fender flares to accommodate 295/30/20 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires on 20x11" ET25 BBS LM-R wheels

Custom carbon fiber hood by Seibon with a 3" cowl induction scoop and integrated NACA ducts for brake cooling, paired with a Maxton Design GT rear spoiler (carbon fiber, 4" height) for balanced downforce at speed

Full interior overhaul with Recaro Pole Position seats (fixed-back, carbon fiber shell) wrapped in Alcantara and red Nappa leather, a NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub, and a custom roll cage by Autopower Industries (8-point, mild steel, bolt-in) with harness bar for track use
